scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web,ngrok,liff -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npx ngrok http 3000" "npx cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:5173"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/backend && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/backend && npm run lint --workspace apps/web
